verses.text: “Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung ki-ukna sung omzia pen a leenggah lo-ah na a sem ding a cial dingin zing tungin a kuankhia leenggah lo neipa tawh kibang hi
Ni tha ngeina ngun peek khat piak dingin a kithukim khit uh ciangin a leenggah lo-ah na a sem dingin pawlkhat a kuansak hi
Zingsang nai kua hun ciangin mihon omna sumbukah pai leuleu a, mi pawlkhat bangmah semloin a mawk om a muh ciangin
‘No zong leenggah lo-ah va kuan un; a kilawm zah khat ka hong pia ding hi,’ a cih ciangin pawlkhat a kuan uh hi
Tua ciangin sun sawmlenih ciangin pawlkhat cial leuleu a, nitak nai thum ciangin pawlkhat a cial lai hi
Nitak nai nga ciangin mihon omna sumbukah a pai leh mi pawlkhat a mawk om mu ahih manin, ‘Bang hangin bangmah semloin sunthapai mawk om na hi uh hiam?’ ci-in a dot ciangin
amaute in, ‘Kuamah in nasem dingin hong ciallo hi,’ ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘No zong leenggah lo-ah va kuan un,’ a ci hi
“Nitak ciangin lo neipa in a nuai-a nasem ukpa kiangah, ‘Lo khote sam in la, a kicial nunung pena kipanin a kicial masa pente dongin a ni tha uh pia in,’ a ci hi
Nitak nai nga hunin a kipan nasemte ngun peek khat ciat kipia hi
A kuan masa pente, ni tha sang dingin hong pai uh ciangin adangte sangin tam ngahzaw ding ci-in amau kilamen napi-in amaute zong ngun peek khat ciat mah kipia veve hi
A sum a san' uh ciangin lo neipa tungah phun uh a
‘A nunungte in nai khat sung bek sem napi-in, sunthapai-in nisa thuakin na a sem kote tawh na kikimsak hi,’ a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin lo neipa in amaute khat kiangah, ‘Lawm aw, nang ka hong khem het kei hi. Ni khat sung nasep thaman dingin ngun peek khat piak dingin na thukimsa hilo ahi hiam
Hih na thalawhsa sum la in la ciah in. Nang ka hong piakzah mah, hih a kicial nunungte tungah zong ka pia nuam hi
Keima sum pen keima ut bangin ka zattheih ding hilo ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh kei ka cit manin na heh suak ahi hiam?’ a ci hi
Tua ahih manin a neute lian ding a, a liante neu ding hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in A Sihding A Thumveina Genkhol

verses.text: Jerusalem khua manawhin Jesuh a paitoh laitakin, a paikawmun sawmlenihte tawh tuamtonin thu genpih a
“Tu-in Jerusalem khua-ah a paito ding ihi hi. Siampi liante leh Thukham hilh siate tungah Mihing Tapa kihek ding a, amaute in a si dingin thu a khenkhit uh ciangin
Gentail mite in simmawh bawlin, satin, singlamteh tungah a khai dingin amaute khutsungah a pia ding uh hi. Ahi zongin a ni thum ni-in kihing kiksak ding hi,” ci-in a tuamin thu a hilh hi.
Tua ciangin Zebedi tate James leh Johan' nu, a tate gel tawh Jesuh kiangah hong pai-in a mai-ah khukdin'in hong thum hi
Jesuh in tua nupi kiangah, “Bang deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amah in, “Kumpi-in na om ciangin hih ka tate khat na taklamah, khat na veilamah a tutna dingin thu pia lecin ka ut hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Na nget uh na thei kei uh hi. Ka thuakding gimna note in thuakzo ding na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Ka thuakzo ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Keima thuak mah bangin note in na thuak takpi ding uh a, ahi zongin ka taklam leh ka veilama tutding pen kei' hong piaktheih hilo hi. Ka Pa in a sehsa mite-a' ding bek ahi hi,” a ci hi
Nungzui dang sawmte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hih unau nihte tungah a heh uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute sam a, “Mi a uk Gentail-te in mite tungah aana nei uh a, mi a makai Gentail-te in thuneihna tawh a ukna thu na thei uh hi
Ahi zongin note lakah tua bang hilo ding hi. Note lakah a lian ahi dingte note' nasem hi ding a
note' lakah a lianpen ahi dingte note' sila hi ding hi
Mihing Tapa zong nasem nei dingin hong pai hiloin mi dangte-a' ding na semin, mi tampi tatna ding a si dingin a hong pai ahih mah bangin note zong a tuaci ding na hi uh hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Mittaw Mi Nih in Khua Mukik

verses.text: Jerikho khua panin a paikhiat uh ciangin mi tampi in Jesuh a zui uh hi
Lampi gei-ah a tu mittaw mi nih in tua lampi tawnin Jesuh hong pai hi, ci-in a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin kiko uh a, “David' suan Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in,” a ci uh hi
Mihonpite in tua mite gel a kikoko lohna dingun a taii uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute kiko pha semsem uh a, “David' suan Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in,” a ci teitei uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh khawlin amaute sam a, “Bang ka hong hihsak ding deih na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin
amaute in, “Topa aw, ka mit uh khua hong musakkik in,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in amaute hehpihhuai sa ahih manin a mit uh lawn'sak a, thakhat thu-in a mit un khua a mukik pah hi. Tua ciangin amaute gel in zong Jesuh nung a zuipah uh hi.
